goal: Add a side-effect-free render dry-run for BPK-068 memory cache audit export evidence packs, producing a preview payload without writing files, durable storage, DB, filesystem cache, scheduler, routes, package, workflow, deployment, or external-call changes.
scope_out: Do not write export files, add durable storage, DB writes, filesystem cache files, scheduler, routes, package changes, workflow changes, deployment files, or external calls.
claims: Audit export evidence packs can be rendered as dry-run previews without writing files.
Ready BPK-068 evidence pack and render refs are required.
assumptions: Actual export persistence would be a later task.
dod: Ready, missing render ref, and blocked evidence pack cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: File writes, durable storage, DB, filesystem cache, scheduler, route, package, workflow, deployment, or external-call changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-068 bundled memory cache audit export contracts as evidence packs without file writes.
